songs.title: Uptight
feed: “Uptight” by Green Day spends a 3rd week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.
“Uptight” by Green Day is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 105 sales units.
“Uptight” by Green Day is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 220 streams units.
“Uptight” by Green Day is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 399,840 total units.

songs.title: All the Time
feed: “All the Time” by Green Day reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 3 spots to #2.

songs.title: Worry Rock
feed: “Worry Rock” by Green Day reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 23 spots to #3.

songs.title: Walking Alone
feed: “Walking Alone” by Green Day reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 47 spots to #4.
“Walking Alone” by Green Day climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 47 spots to #4.
“Walking Alone” by Green Day is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 402% to 291 points.

songs.title: Reject

songs.title: Redundant

songs.title: Red (Taylor's Version)
